question: Fish allergy – is the tartar sauce safe?

history.speaker: client
history.text: Fish allergy – is the tartar sauce safe?

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Hmm, I don't have specific information about tartar sauce on our menu. But since you have a fish allergy, you should avoid items like Fillet-O-Fish and Caesar Salad options that contain fish (which are listed separately in our dietary warnings). Would you like to try one of those instead?
